title: extensions.value_codecs
description: Operator-declared, position-scoped literal conversions applied AFTER parsing — never as raw-text substitution. Each codec binds to a stored property; query-side literals in that property's position are decoded ('Q42'->42), and direct result-column projections of it are encoded back (42->'Q42'). Applies to cypher_query and tools[].cypher. No trust gate (pure declarative data transformation, no code execution). Replaces the removed extensions.cypher_preprocessor (0.10.27).

property.description: The stored column the codec governs (e.g. 'id'). Literals compared against this property are decoded; direct projections of it are encoded.

kind.description: prefix: strip/add a fixed prefix. map: a fixed bijective lookup table. regex: full-match rewrite of the literal string.

prefix.description: (kind=prefix) The prefix to strip on decode / add on encode, e.g. 'Q'.

stored_type.description: (kind=prefix) The type the remainder must parse as on decode. Decode is total: a non-parsing remainder leaves the literal unchanged.

map.description: (kind=map) Mapping of input string -> stored value. Must be bijective (no two keys map to the same value), else the server fails to boot.

match.description: (kind=regex) Regex matched as a full-match against the single literal (anchor it). Captures feed the decode template.

decode.description: (kind=regex) Replacement template (e.g. '$3-$2-$1') producing the stored form.

encode.description: (kind=regex) Optional reverse: { match, replace } applied to the stored value on result projection.
